title: Acadia (ACAD) Q1 Earnings Surpass Estimates, Revenues Miss
text: Acadia Pharmaceuticals reported Q1 2024 results with earnings that surpassed estimates despite missing on revenue. Q1 2024 earnings per share of $0.10 beat the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $0.04. Total revenues of $205.8 million missed the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $206.9 million. NUPLAZID net product sales of $125.0 million were essentially flat year-over-year. DAYBUE net product sales of $79.5 million increased 74% year-over-year. The strong earnings beat was driven by better-than-expected gross margins and operating leverage. The company maintained its 2024 revenue guidance while providing updated product-specific forecasts reflecting stronger DAYBUE momentum offset by softer NUPLAZID trends. Management attributed the NUPLAZID softness to prior competitive dynamics that appeared to be stabilizing.
